advancement.mcwaterslides.around_the_wor: Ride a single slide for 10,000 blocks
advancement.mcwaterslides.lazy_river.des: Ride a slide for 100 blocks in one go
advancement.mcwaterslides.screamer.descr: Hit top speed on a slide
advancement.mcwaterslides.screamer.title: Screamer
advancement.mcwaterslides.stick_the_land: End a ride in a Splash Pool
advancement.mcwaterslides.tube_rat.title: Tube Rat
book.mcwaterslides.guide.landing: Welcome to $(item)MC Waterslides$()! Everything here is cheap, fast, and wet. Build enormous slides, push them uphill with jets, and always land in a pool.
book.mcwaterslides.guide.name: Park Builder's Manual
message.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.no_rf: Out of RF — connect a Pump House or RF source
message.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.no_tar: ⚠ Facing a solid block — aim the wheel at the open space to fill
message.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.placed: Give it RF + a redstone signal to flood the space it faces
message.mcwaterslides.flood_valve_leak: Flood Valve: volume not sealed — leak near %s, %s, %s
tip.mcwaterslides.flood_valve: Redstone ON floods the sealed space it faces — glass tunnels become water rides.
tip.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.more: Right-click any time to read its status. If the space leaks, smoke rises at the hole and the spot lands in your action bar.
tip.mcwaterslides.jet: Pushes riders and water the way it faces. Needs RF and a wet nozzle.
tip.mcwaterslides.jet.more: Energizes ~24 blocks of current — even uphill. Touching jets share RF down the row, so wire just one. Redstone toggles it.
tip.mcwaterslides.pump_house: Burns coal into RF for jets and valves. Water beside it trickles power for free.
tip.mcwaterslides.pump_house.more: Wire it with Water Conduits or any RF mod's cables. One Pump House feeds a whole daisy-chained jet row.
tip.mcwaterslides.slide_channel: Ride it! Step in and slopes carry you — 16 dye colors, cheap by design.
tip.mcwaterslides.slide_channel.more: One craft makes 16. Place along a run to extend it; lanes placed side-by-side merge into wide slides. Crouch to brake, jump to bail.
tip.mcwaterslides.slide_tube: An enclosed slide — build loops, long drops, and vertical shafts.
tip.mcwaterslides.slide_tube.more: Stack tubes into a column for a drop shaft. Once inside you ride to the exit. The glass-ring recipe makes see-through tubes.
tip.mcwaterslides.splash_pool: The soft landing — catches riders safely at ride's end.
tip.mcwaterslides.splash_pool.more: Place pools side-by-side and they merge into one big pool. Mobs and dropped items get caught too.
tip.mcwaterslides.water_conduit: Carries RF along your slide's spine.
tooltip.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.how: Redstone ON fills · OFF drains. Needs RF.
tooltip.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.leaks: Not watertight? It points at the leak.
tooltip.mcwaterslides.flood_valve.what: Floods a sealed space it faces with water.
